0_Overview: What is Kotlin: Modern, Statically Typed JVM Language by JetBrains
Benefits: 100% Interoperable with Java
Benefits: Null Safety Built into the Type System
Benefits: Concise — Eliminates Java Boilerplate
Benefits: Coroutines for Structured Concurrency
Benefits: Official Android Development Language
Benefits: Multiplatform: JVM, Android, JS, Native (Kotlin Multiplatform)
Benefits: Smart Casts, Data Classes, Extension Functions
Drawbacks: Slower Compilation than Java
Drawbacks: Larger Binary Size on Android
Drawbacks: Kotlin Multiplatform Still Maturing
Drawbacks: Some Java Interop Edge Cases
When to Use: Android App Development
When to Use: Server-side with Spring Boot or Ktor

When NOT to Use: iOS-only apps (use Swift), Performance-critical systems

any, all, none, count, find, first, last

suspend Functions: Can be Paused and Resumed
runBlocking: Bridge Between Blocking and Coroutine World

StateFlow: Hot Flow for State (replaces LiveData)
Channel: Hot Stream for Communication Between Coroutines
